allowedClaims: Phase AAI-P1 baseline safety clarification included in cumulative working copy.
Candidate RFCs, machine contracts, scenarios, and hostile tests are available for architect review.
Static JSON validation has been performed for this phase package.
promotionLimits: Draft candidate schemas under 04_implementation_and_conformance do not become active 03_machine_contracts by packaging.
Candidate RFCs under phase folders do not become active accepted RFCs by packaging.
Scenario and break-test fixtures do not prove implementation behavior until executed.
